description_long: This is a detached residential house with a pitched, multi-gabled roof and a combination of white and brown exterior walls. The house features a prominent covered front porch supported by columns, with steps leading up to the main entrance. Large windows are symmetrically arranged on the front and sides, providing ample natural light. The property is bordered by a low fence and includes a spacious paved driveway and a green lawn area. The rear of the house has a smaller porch and additional access points. The structure sits on a corner lot with sidewalks and roadways on two sides, typical of suburban neighborhoods.
description: A detached house with a multi-gabled roof, covered front porch, white and brown exterior, large windows, and a fenced yard with driveway and lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, main entrance, and large windows with a fenced yard and driveway to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gabled roof, side windows, and the continuation of the fence and lawn along the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a smaller porch, back entrance, and the paved driveway area extending behind the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows, the lawn, and the full extent of the driveway and fencing.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered front porch with steps, columns, and a central door beneath a gabled overhang
